productDisplayName: Nike Men's As Go Dunk Black T-shirt
description: CompositionBlack  round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with graphic  print  and metallic color detailing on the front, and grey fabric tape on inseam of the neckline FittingRegularWash care Machine wash cold with like colors Do not bleach Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Cool iron, but do not iron directly on print/embroidery Do not dry clean Get ready to play hard in this black Athletic Department  t-shirt from nike. The graphic lettering saying "Go dunk yourself" carries the spirit of aggressive Basketball games. Team this with jeans and canvas shoes for a casual look.
